c.d: Ability to compare prices across multiple retailers to find the best deal.
Availability of coupons and promo codes to apply additional discounts.
Feature to track price changes over time and alert users to price drops.
Functionality to scan product barcodes for quick price comparisons.
Provision of cashback rewards on purchases made through the app.
Access to user-generated reviews and ratings for products.
Ability to find and alert users to deals available at nearby physical stores.
Option to create and manage wishlists for tracking desired products.
Availability of the app across various platforms (iOS, Android, Web).
Ease of use and overall user experience of the app.
